enough water make firm dough.
Wrap pastry cling film rest refrigerator while prepare apples.
Roll pastry between sheets baking parchment.
Using knife, circle tart tin, line tart with shortcrust.
Place apple slices into pastry case overlapping spiral beginning outer edge ending centre.
